forbiddenOperations.name: DROP_COLUMN_WITHOUT_CONTRACT
forbiddenOperations.description: DROP COLUMN operations must only occur in contract phase migrations. Use expand-contract pattern: add new column first, migrate data, then drop old column.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration file name contains 'contract' or is marked with -- contract phase comment

forbiddenOperations.name: ALTER_COLUMN_TYPE_WITHOUT_EXPAND
forbiddenOperations.description: ALTER COLUMN TYPE operations must use expand-contract pattern. Add new column with new type, migrate data, then drop old column.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration file name contains 'contract' or is marked with -- contract phase comment

forbiddenOperations.name: CREATE_INDEX_WITHOUT_CONCURRENTLY
forbiddenOperations.description: CREATE INDEX must use CONCURRENTLY to avoid blocking writes on production tables. Use CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY instead.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration is for initial schema creation (e.g., 0000_*.sql) or table is small (<1000 rows)

forbiddenOperations.name: DROP_TABLE_WITHOUT_CONTRACT
forbiddenOperations.description: DROP TABLE operations must only occur in contract phase migrations. Use expand-contract pattern: create new table, migrate data, then drop old table.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration file name contains 'contract' or is marked with -- contract phase comment

forbiddenOperations.name: DROP_CONSTRAINT_WITHOUT_CONTRACT
forbiddenOperations.description: DROP CONSTRAINT operations must only occur in contract phase migrations. Use expand-contract pattern: add new constraint, validate, then drop old constraint.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration file name contains 'contract' or is marked with -- contract phase comment

forbiddenOperations.name: ADD_NOT_NULL_WITHOUT_DEFAULT
forbiddenOperations.description: Adding NOT NULL constraint without default value can fail on existing data. Use expand-contract pattern: add nullable column, backfill data, then add NOT NULL constraint.
forbiddenOperations.exception: Migration file name contains 'contract' or is marked with -- contract phase comment

requiredPatterns.name: PHASE_COMMENT
requiredPatterns.description: Migrations should include phase comments to indicate which phase of expand-contract pattern they represent.
requiredPatterns.exception: Migration is for initial schema creation or simple additive changes

requiredPatterns.name: ROLLBACK_COMMENT
requiredPatterns.description: Migrations should include rollback instructions in comments.
requiredPatterns.exception: Migration is for initial schema creation or is reversible by design
